author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Design (grounded): MIGRATE FLOW -- (1) preflight: fetch + force compaction, refuse on pending offline promotions; (2) build genesis CheckpointState FROM FILES (authoritative): all issue files + comment files + milestone files + counters -> issues/comments/time_entries (CompactIssue now carries them post-#756), display_id_map from file claims, next_* reconciled to on-disk maxima, locks from compacted state, watermark = max OrderingKey across all agent logs so v3 readers apply only post-genesis events; (3) seed refs/crosslink/agents/<id> from each v2 events.log via hub_v3::commit_log_bytes (child-commit reconcile when dual-write shadow refs already exist); (4) genesis checkpoint state.json onto refs/crosslink/checkpoint via generalized commit_named_blob helper; (5) refs/crosslink/meta: hub marker (hub_version=3, source commit) + allowed_signers; (6) push all refs fast-forward; (7) AC-6 GATE: full-state diff -- file-derived state vs reduce(RefHubSource) over the new refs; any field mismatch = FAIL + rollback (delete created refs; v2 branch never touched). NEW COMPONENT RefHubSource: HubSource impl over checkpoint ref + per-agent refs (becomes the #754 production read path; built here because the migration verification needs it). FINALIZE: separate explicit --finalize deletes crosslink/hub local+remote after re-verification -- this is the only hard stop for OLD binaries: grounding finding, read_layout_version callers use >=2 / unwrap_or(1), so already-shipped clients CANNOT be made to refuse a v3 hub via version bumps; v2 branch therefore remains authoritative-compatible until finalize, and mixed-version operation pre-finalize is documented as user-managed. v3-aware detection (hub_v3::hub_version -> V2/V3/Both) warns when operating v2-mode on a migrated hub; full refusal flips at #754.
